sevenDayForecast.headline: A Low chance of redevelopment of Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji from Sunday.
points: Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji (12U) is located over northern inland Queensland, and is moving west.
It is forecast to move northwest for the remainder of the week, through the Gulf Country in Queensland.
On the weekend, it may move over Gulf of Carpentaria waters, where it has a Low chance of redeveloping into a tropical cyclone from Sunday.

From next week its evolution becomes uncertain. It may dissipate. There is also a risk that it will turn east, eventually moving off the northeastern Queensland coast and back into the Coral Sea from mid-next week.
